notes: Sentence-final 'sih' on a status update ('belum dapat jawaban' = 'haven't gotten an answer yet') with implicit subject (Indonesian frequently drops subjects in conversation; English fills in with 'I' or 'we' or null). English 'though' preserves the soft-hedge register. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: if it's a shared task the subject could be 'we'; the rule doesn't know the speaker's intent here. This fixture currently elides the subject in English — alternative could be 'I haven't gotten an answer, though'.
